name: golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev
title: golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev
summary: Xerial-compatible Snappy framing support for Go
description:
Xerial-compatible Snappy framing support for Go
The package wraps Go's built-in Snappy package (github.com/golang/snappy)
adding support for a Xerial compatible framing format.
.
The package was extracted from Shopify's sarama Kafka client.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev because Xerial-compatible Snappy framing support for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-eapache-go-xerial-snappy-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
